body{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;background:var(--dark);min-height:100vh;overflow:hidden;color:#fff;} /* ===== 背景 ===== */ .bg{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0c2233 0%,#0a4a6b 45%,#0a7ea4 100%);overflow:hidden;} .wave{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:-10%;width:120%;border-radius:50% 50% 0 0/80px 80px 0 0;opacity:.15;animation:waveFlow 7s ease-in-out infinite;} .wave1{background:var(--ocean-lt);height:140px;} .wave2{background:#7dd8f0;height:110px;bottom:10px;animation-delay:-2.5s;} .wave3{background:#b8eeff;height:85px;bottom:20px;animation-delay:-4.5s;opacity:.09;} @keyframes waveFlow{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(3%)}} .sun{position:absolute;top:-80px;right:8%;width:260px;height:260px;background:radial-gradient(circle,#ffe566 0%,var(--sunset) 45%,rgba(255,130,0,0) 72%);border-radius:50%;opacity:.22;animation:sunPulse 6s ease-in-out infinite;} @keyframes sunPulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.05)}} .hib{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;opacity:.07;pointer-events:none;} .h1{width:160px;height:160px;background:var(--coral);top:10%;left:5%;} .h2{width:100px;height:100px;background:var(--sand);top:60%;right:12%;} /* ===== アプリ全体 ===== */ .app{ position:relative;z-index:2; display:flex;flex-direction:column; height:100vh; padding:10px 14px 8px; gap:8px; overflow:hidden; } /* ===== ヘッダー ===== */ header{ display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between; flex:0 0 auto; min-height:0;overflow:hidden; } .logo-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;min-width:0;} .logo-img{height:44px;width:auto;display:block;flex-shrink:0;filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 12px rgba(255,160,50,.4));} .logo-sub{font-size:7px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.36);letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;white-space:nowrap;display:none;} .header-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;flex-shrink:0;} .lang-toggle{display:flex;background:rgba(0,0,0,.25);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;} .lang-btn{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:8.5px;font-weight:800;padding:4px 10px;border:none;cursor:pointer;background:transparent;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);transition:all .2s;} .lang-btn.active{background:var(--sand);color:#0c2233;} .status-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--foam);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:8.5px;font-weight:800;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);} .dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);transition:all .3s;flex-shrink:0;} .dot.live{background:#50fa7b;box-shadow:0 0 7px #50fa7b;} .dot.auto{background:var(--sand);box-shadow:0 0 7px var(--sand);animation:blink 1s infinite;} .dot.capture{background:var(--coral);box-shadow:0 0 9px var(--coral);} @keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}} /* ===== キャプチャー表示（最優先） ===== */ .capture-hero{ flex:1 1 0; /* 残り全スペースを取る */ min-height:60px; /* 最低限これだけは確保 */ overflow:hidden; position:relative; } .capture-frame{ width:100%;height:100%; background:rgba(0,0,0,.55); border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;position:relative; box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5); transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s; } .capture-frame.glowing{ border-color:var(--coral); box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(244,98,58,.35),0 8px 40px rgba(244,98,58,.25); } #capturedImg{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block;opacity:0;transition:opacity .4s;} #capturedImg.visible{opacity:1;} .capture-placeholder{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;text-align:center;} .placeholder-icon{font-size:44px;animation:floatAnim 3s ease-in-out infinite;} @keyframes floatAnim{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-9px)}} .placeholder-text{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;line-height:2;color:rgba(255,255,255,.27);} .course-badge{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(10,126,164,.85),rgba(6,78,110,.85));border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 13px;font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:12px;color:var(--sand-lt);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:none;} .course-badge.show{display:block;} .capture-ts{position:absolute;bottom:8px;right:10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);display:none;} .capture-ts.show{display:block;} /* ===== ボトムバー（縮小可能） ===== */ .bottom-bar{ flex:0 1 auto; /* 縮小可、拡大しない */ min-height:0; overflow:hidden; display:grid; grid-template-columns:220px 1fr; gap:8px; align-items:start; /* 高さが足りないときにコンテンツが潰れるようにする */ } /* カメラパネル */ .camera-panel{ background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--foam); border-radius:12px;padding:8px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px); overflow:hidden;min-height:0; } .panel-label{font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--sand);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px;opacity:.8;} .video-wrap{position:relative;background:#000;border-radius:7px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:16/9;margin-bottom:6px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);} #cameraFeed{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;} .corner{position:absolute;width:10px;height:10px;border-color:var(--sand);border-style:solid;opacity:.5;} .corner.tl{top:3px;left:3px;border-width:2px 0 0 2px;} .corner.tr{top:3px;right:3px;border-width:2px 2px 0 0;} .corner.bl{bottom:3px;left:3px;border-width:0 0 2px 2px;} .corner.br{bottom:3px;right:3px;border-width:0 2px 2px 0;} .sp-dot{position:absolute;width:7px;height:7px;border:2px solid;border-radius:2px;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);pointer-events:none;display:none;box-shadow:0 0 4px currentColor;} .sp-dot.show{display:block;} .live-badge{position:absolute;top:3px;left:3px;background:var(--coral);color:#fff;font-size:5.5px;font-weight:800;padding:2px 4px;border-radius:3px;display:none;animation:blink 1.2s infinite;} .live-badge.show{display:block;} select{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:8.5px;font-weight:700;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:5px;padding:4px 7px;width:100%;cursor:pointer;outline:none;margin-bottom:5px;} select:focus{border-color:var(--sand);} .btn-row{display:flex;gap:5px;} .btn{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:8.5px;font-weight:800;padding:5px 9px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid;transition:all .15s;letter-spacing:.03em;white-space:nowrap;} .btn-ocean{border-color:var(--ocean-lt);color:var(--ocean-lt);background:transparent;} .btn-ocean:hover{background:var(--ocean-lt);color:#fff;} .btn-ghost{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);background:transparent;} .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);} .btn:active{transform:scale(.96);} .btn:disabled{opacity:.3;cursor:not-allowed;pointer-events:none;} /* コントロールパネル */ .ctrl-panel{ background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--foam); border-radius:12px;padding:10px 12px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px); display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;overflow:hidden;min-height:0; } /* AUTO + 手動 常時表示 */ .ctrl-top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:6px;align-items:center;} .auto-toggle{ display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between; background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-radius:9px;padding:6px 11px; } .auto-label{font-size:9.5px;font-weight:800;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);letter-spacing:.07em;} .toggle-switch{position:relative;width:38px;height:21px;cursor:pointer;} .toggle-switch input{opacity:0;width:0;height:0;} .toggle-track{position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:11px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);transition:background .3s;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);} .toggle-thumb{position:absolute;top:3px;left:3px;width:15px;height:15px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;transition:transform .3s;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.3);} input:checked ~ .toggle-track{background:var(--coral);} input:checked ~ .toggle-thumb{transform:translateX(17px);} /* タイムプログレス */ .time-progress-wrap{ display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px; background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-radius:9px;padding:6px 11px; } .time-progress-label{font-size:7.5px;font-weight:800;color:rgba(255,255,255,.38);letter-spacing:.1em;white-space:nowrap;} .time-progress-bar{ flex:1;height:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden; } .time-progress-fill{ height:100%;width:0%;border-radius:3px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--palm-lt),var(--sand),var(--coral)); transition:width .1s linear; } .time-progress-num{font-size:8px;font-weight:800;color:var(--sand);min-width:28px;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;} /* Manual capture */ .capture-big{ width:100%;padding:9px; font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:13px; border:2px solid var(--coral);border-radius:10px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(244,98,58,.1),rgba(255,139,99,.05)); color:var(--coral-lt);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;letter-spacing:.05em; } .capture-big:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--coral),var(--coral-lt));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(244,98,58,.4);transform:translateY(-1px);} .capture-big:active{transform:scale(.97);} .capture-big:disabled{opacity:.3;pointer-events:none;} /* デバッグ折り畳み */ .debug-toggle-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;} .debug-toggle-btn{ font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:7.5px;font-weight:800; padding:4px 10px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer; border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);color:rgba(255,255,255,.4); background:transparent;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px; } .debug-toggle-btn:hover{border-color:var(--sand);color:var(--sand);} .debug-toggle-btn.open{border-color:var(--sand);color:var(--sand);background:rgba(245,217,139,.06);} .debug-chevron{display:inline-block;transition:transform .25s;font-size:8px;} .debug-toggle-btn.open .debug-chevron{transform:rotate(180deg);} .debug-area{overflow:hidden;max-height:0;opacity:0;transition:max-height .3s ease,opacity .25s ease;} .debug-area.open{max-height:400px;opacity:1;} .debug-inner{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;padding-top:2px;} /* 4点デバッグ */ .debug-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:5px;} .dbg-point{background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 6px;transition:border-color .15s,background .15s;} .dbg-point.hit{border-color:var(--palm-lt);background:rgba(76,175,119,.08);} .dbg-coord{font-size:6px;font-weight:800;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);letter-spacing:.04em;margin-bottom:3px;} .dbg-swatch{width:100%;height:12px;border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:3px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);background:#333;transition:background .15s;} .dbg-rgb{font-size:6px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);font-weight:700;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .dbg-stat{font-size:6.5px;font-weight:800;margin-top:2px;} .dbg-stat.ok{color:var(--palm-lt);} .dbg-stat.ng{color:rgba(255,255,255,.26);} /* スライダー */ .sliders-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:7px 12px;} .ctrl-group{} .ctrl-name{font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.13em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;} .slider-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;} input[type=range]{-webkit-appearance:none;flex:1;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:2px;outline:none;} input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--sand);cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 0 5px rgba(245,217,139,.5);} .slider-val{font-size:9px;font-weight:800;color:var(--sand);min-width:26px;text-align:right;} /* 基準色 */ .target-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 9px;} .target-swatch{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:4px;background:#434343;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);flex-shrink:0;} .target-info{font-size:7.5px;font-weight:800;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);line-height:1.7;} .target-hex{color:var(--sand-lt);font-size:9.5px;font-weight:800;} /* アクション */ .action-row{display:flex;gap:5px;} /* Flash */ .flash{position:fixed;inset:0;background:#fff;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:999;} .flash.go{animation:flashAnim .3s ease-out forwards;} @keyframes flashAnim{0%{opacity:.6}100%{opacity:0}} /* Float */ #floatingCapture{position:fixed;z-index:200;background:rgba(10,34,51,.92);border:2px solid var(--coral);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5),0 0 20px rgba(244,98,58,.2);display:none;cursor:move;user-select:none;} #floatingCapture.visible{display:block;} .float-bar{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(244,98,58,.2),rgba(255,139,99,.1));padding:5px 10px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;} .float-title{font-family:'Pacifico',cursive;font-size:10px;color:var(--coral-lt);} .float-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--coral);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;padding:0;} #floatingImg{display:block;width:300px;height:169px;object-fit:contain;} canvas{display:none;} /* ==================================================== レスポンシブ: ウィンドウが縮んだとき順次非表示 キャプチャー画像が最優先 ==================================================== */ /* ウィンドウの高さが低い場合 */ @media (max-height: 560px) { .logo-img { height:34px; } .status-pill span{ display:none; } .sliders-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; } } @media (max-height: 480px) { /* カメラパネルを非表示→ボトムバー1カラム化 */ .camera-panel { display:none; } .bottom-bar { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .panel-label { display:none; } .debug-area.open{ max-height:200px; } } @media (max-height: 380px) { /* ボトムバー全体を極限まで縮める */ .bottom-bar { gap:4px; } .ctrl-panel { padding:6px 8px; gap:5px; } .capture-big{ display:none; } .debug-toggle-row{ display:none; } .debug-area { display:none; } .time-progress-wrap{ display:none; } } @media (max-height: 300px) { /* ボトムバー完全非表示 */ .bottom-bar { display:none; } header { display:none; } .app { padding:4px; gap:4px; } } /* ウィンドウの幅が狭い場合 */ @media (max-width: 640px) { .bottom-bar { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .camera-panel { display:none; } .sliders-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; } } @media (max-width: 480px) { .logo-img { height:28px; } .ctrl-panel { padding:8px 10px; } .sliders-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } } @media (max-width: 360px) { .header-right { gap:4px; } .lang-toggle { display:none; } }
